---
name: Content Suggestion
about: Propose a new topic, new chapter, or expansion of an existing section
title: "feat: "
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

## What Are You Proposing?

<!-- A clear, one-paragraph description of the content you'd like to see added or expanded. -->

## Which Section Does This Affect?

<!-- Is this a new chapter? An addition to an existing chapter? Which one? -->

- [ ] New chapter
- [ ] Expand an existing section — which one?

## Why Does This Belong Here?

<!-- What real-world problem does this address? Why is it important for API design? -->

## Do You Have Sources?

<!-- List any RFCs, OWASP pages, NIST docs, or other authoritative references that support this content. -->

## Are You Willing to Write It?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to write this and open a PR
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to write

---

> Please wait for a response before starting to write. PRs opened without an acknowledged issue may be closed without review.
